context: Agent maps described capture-evidence.sh failure to the skill's troubleshooting guidance and produces correct remediation commands.

checklist.name: Chromium not installed root cause identified
checklist.description: capture-fix-plan.md identifies the missing Chromium executable as one root cause.

checklist.name: Port conflict root cause identified
checklist.description: capture-fix-plan.md identifies the port 3000 conflict as a second root cause.

checklist.name: Chromium install command provided

checklist.name: Port verification command provided
checklist.description: capture-fix-plan.md includes a command to check port occupancy (e.g. lsof -i :3000) before re-running the script.

checklist.name: Corrected capture command provided
